conservative.name: Sigmar's Light
conservative.requirements: 8 favour, must proudly hold forth a symbol of your faith

success.description: You glow with holy light, illuminating those tainted by corruption! Each character or object in your line of sight who has 1 or more corruption is revealed to you as a glowing light

As above, and the intensity of the light gives you a relative sense of how corrupted and trained the characters are. Daemons are the most corrupt, followed by mutants and those bearing a Mask of Chaos, and finally ordinary people with corruption below the corruption threshold

boon.description: You gain an inkling of the direction to the closest, strongest source or corruption in the area, even if it's not in sight

chaosStar.description: You suffer 1 stress per corrupted character within close range
